parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination value for next page of results

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: The number of results to return per page. Maximum: 25

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties that should be expanded in the response.

parameters.name: excludes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties that should not be expanded in the response.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Filter results to contacts updated on or after the given date

parameters.name: since_includes_expanded
parameters.description:
By default since only includes contacts that have been updated since the date. If true, contacts
will be included if any records being expanded have been updated on or after the since date as well

parameters.name: school_year_id
parameters.description:
Filters to contacts with workflow status in the given year, and track silos to this year. This means
that track-based fields like status, enrollment_type and grade will reflect their values for this year.

parameters.name: grade_id
parameters.description: Filter contacts by grade id. Enter a comma-separated list. school_year_id is required to use this parameter.

parameters.name: contact_status
parameters.description: Filter contacts by status. Enter a comma-separated list. school_year_id is required to use this parameter.

parameters.name: enrollment_type
parameters.description: Filter contacts by enrollment_type. Enter a comma-separated list. school_year_id is required to use this parameter.

parameters.name: active_only
parameters.description:
If true, filters to contacts whose active year is specified by school_year_id. The active year for
a contact is the latest year a contact has workflow status in.

parameters.name: includes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties that should be expanded in the response.

parameters.name: excludes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties that should not be expanded in the response.

parameters.name: school_year_id
parameters.description:
Track silos to this year. This means that track-based fields like status, enrollment_type and grade
will reflect their values for this year.

field_name.example: Canonical name for the field you wish to update. Tip: Use the /api/external/contacts/{id} GET endpoint to see field names.

value.example: string or number or boolean or null

school_year_id.example: Optional. For track-siloed fields, specify the uuid of the school year to which this field value applies. Please only include school_year_id OR start_year.

start_year.example: Optional. For track-siloed fields, specify the start_year of the school year to which this field value applies. Please only include school_year_id OR start_year.

field_name.example: Canonical name for the field you wish to update. Tip: Use the /api/external/contacts/{id} GET endpoint to see field names.

value.example: string or number or boolean or null

school_year_id.example: Optional. For track-siloed fields, specify the uuid of the school year to which this field value applies. Please only include school_year_id OR start_year.

start_year.example: Optional. For track-siloed fields, specify the start_year of the school year to which this field value applies. Please only include school_year_id OR start_year.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Date - Filters to results updated on or after the given date

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of records to return. Default: 25

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor to get the next set of users

first_name.description: The first name of this user

email.description: The email address for this user

updated_at.description: Last time this user was updated

type.description: One of User or Admin. User indicates a parent system user, while Admin indicates an employee of the school

internal_description.description: The description text for the Field

searchable.description: True if the Field is available in Search in Finalsite Enrollment

options.description: An array of strings representing the options for this field, if applicable

grouping.description: The grouping of this Field in Search

parent_id.description: The id of the Field's parent Field, if any

id_field_counter.description: For ID Fields, the counter value for the Field

id_field_autogenerate.description: Whether or not id values for the Field should be automatically generated

is_track_siloed.description: Whether or not the Field is track siloed

created_at.description: Timestamp denoting the creation date and time of this object

long_name.description: Long official name for the school.

customer_type.description: Indicates whether the customer is a live production customer, a demo customer, etc.

subdomain.description: Subdomain used to access this customer

domain.description: Domain used to access this customer

time_zone.description: The customer's time zone, in [IANA Time Zone Database identifier format](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_tz_database_time_zones)

field_id.description: The field's ID. The complete Field details can be obtained from the Fields resource

stage.description: Denotes with which stage the custom status should be grouped

status_type.description: Denotes to which status type the custom status belongs

birth_date.description: The contact's birth date as YYYY-MM-DD

gender.description: Canonical representation of the contact's gender as a single letter code (Female, Male, Non-Binary, Self-Identify or Prefer Not To Answer)

status.description: Current workflow status. The list of Contact workflow statuses can be obtained from /api/external/contact_statuses.

inquiry_submit_date.description: The date the student submitted an inquiry

application_submit_date.description: The date the student submitted an application

contract_submit_date.description: The date the student submitted their last contract

financial_aid_requested.description: Whether financial aid has been requested

financial_aid_amount_requested.description: The amount of financial aid requested

financial_aid_amount.description: The amount of financial aid granted

deposit_amount_paid.description: Deposit amount paid on last contract

tuition_override.description: If provided, a tuition amount that overrides the "standard" tuition amount

deposit_override.description: If provided, a deposit amount that overrides the "standard" deposit amount

enrollment_type.description: Whether the student is a new student or returning student

is_alumni.description: Whether this contact is an alum of the school

billing_autopay_enabled.description: If the contact's associated billing account has enabled autopay

billing_contact_overdue.description: If the associated billing contact has an overdue amount

billing_overdue.description: If the associated billing account has an overdue amount

billing_overdue_at.description: When the billing account became overdue

next_account_billing_date.description: The upcoming billing date for the account

next_billing_date.description: The upcoming billing date for the contact

total_account_balance.description: The total balance for the account

total_contact_balance.description: The total balance for the contact

households.description: List of households associated with this contact

relationships.description: List of relationships for this contact

custom_attributes.description: List of custom field values for this contact

track_attributes.description: List of custom track field values for this contact

id_attributes.description: List of custom ID field values for this contact

school_year.description: The current school year for this contact

prospect_entry_grade.description: For prospect contacts, the grade they are interested in

prospect_entry_year.description: For prospect contacts, the school year they are interested in

contact.description: The full related contact (if requested by `include` parameter)

rel_id.description: Unique ID for the related contact

primary.description: True if related contact is the primary parent or guardian

financial.description: True if related contact has financial responsibility

portal_access.description: True if the related contact has portal access for this contact

tuition.description: The total base tuition amount of the student's contract

discounts_list.description: Discount names and amounts applied to the student's latest contract

fees_list.description: Fee names and amounts included in the student's latest contract

payment_plan_name.description: Name of the Contract Payment Plan

payment_plan_schedule.description: The full schedule for the student's Contract Payment Plan

long_name.description: Long form name of the Grade

promote_to.description: Denotes whether or not this grade should be automatically promoted to another

promote_grade_id.description: The id of the Grade that this Grade promotes to, if any

created_at.description: Timestamp denoting the creation date and time of this object

start_year.description: The calendar year in which the school year starts

created_at.description: Timestamp denoting the creation date and time of this object

birth_date.description: The contact's birth date as YYYY-MM-DD

gender.description: Canonical representation of the contact's gender as a single letter code (Female, Male, Non-Binary, Self-Identify or Prefer Not To Answer)

status.description: Current workflow status. The list of Contact workflow statuses can be obtained from /api/external/contact_statuses.

deposit_amount.description: The full deposit amount on the student's contract

deposit_amount_outstanding.description: The amount remaining to be paid on the student's deposit (Deposit Amount - Deposit Paid)

enrollment_type.description: Whether the student is a new student or returning student

households.description: List of households associated with this contact

relationships.description: List of relationships for this contact

custom_attributes.description: List of custom field values for this contact

track_attributes.description: List of custom track field values for this contact

id_attributes.description: List of custom ID field values for this contact

school_year.description: The current school year for this contact

field_id.description: The field's ID. The complete Field details can be obtained from the Fields resource

next_cursor.description: The cursor value to user for the next page of results. Value is null when no more results
